name: WD_CLOCK_DIGITAL
description: Digital clock widget showing time in large format (HH:MM) with AM/PM indicator and date. AM shown in orange, PM in blue. Time displayed in extra-large LOCK3B23 font (86px). Date shown below (24px). Simple centered layout.
visualForm: Centered digital display: AM/PM text (24px, colored) → large time (86px) → date text (24px) below
descriptionKo: AM/PM 표시와 날짜가 포함된 대형 포맷(HH:MM) 디지털 시계 위젯입니다. AM은 주황색, PM은 파란색으로 표시되며, 86px 초대형 LOCK3B23 폰트로 시간을 보여줍니다.
descriptionEn: Digital clock widget showing time in large format (HH:MM) with AM/PM indicator and date. AM shown in orange, PM in blue. Time displayed in extra-large LOCK3B23 font (86px). Date shown below (24px). Simple centered layout.
